title: README scaffold
description: Scaffolds a README with the 5 canonical headings from the doc-freshness-pipeline spec

issues.title: Write README: What is this?
issues.description: One paragraph. What the project does, who it's for.

issues.title: Write README: How do I run it?
issues.description: Setup, dependencies, commands. This section rots fastest — keep it mechanical and verifiable.

issues.title: Write README: How is it shaped?
issues.description: Key directories/modules and what they do. Not exhaustive — just enough to orient.

issues.title: Write README: What's non-obvious?
issues.description: Gotchas, constraints, things that will bite you. Expensive to rediscover.

issues.title: Write README: Where do I look next?
issues.description: Pointers to mulch, seeds, other docs. Routing, not duplication.

title: Full doc set bootstrap
description: Initialize mulch, seeds, and README for a new project using the doc-freshness-pipeline

issues.title: Initialize mulch
issues.description: Run: ml init && ml add <domain>. Group domains by technology or concern, not by file.

issues.title: Initialize seeds
issues.description: Run: sd init. Creates .seeds/ for git-native issue tracking.

issues.title: Scaffold README
issues.description: Run: sd tpl pour readme-init --prefix 'docs'. Creates issues for each README section. Alternatively, write README directly using the 5 canonical headings.

issues.title: Verify doc infrastructure
issues.description: Confirm: .mulch/ exists with at least one domain, .seeds/ exists, README.md exists with 5 headings. Run: readme-seam-check.sh to verify no warnings.

title: Pattern extraction enrichment cycle
description: Scaffolds a codebook enrichment workflow from the enrichment-roadmap. Creates issues for thin-area enrichment, deferred candidate evaluation, and repo scouting.

issues.title: Audit codebook health scores
issues.description: Run pattern-extraction-pipeline in audit mode on target codebooks. Update enrichment-roadmap.md with current scores. Reference: skills/pattern-extraction-pipeline/references/enrichment-roadmap.md

issues.title: Enrich thin areas
issues.description: For each codebook with Medium+ priority thin areas: run enrichment mode against scouted repos. Add reference files. Update enrichment-roadmap.md resolved section.

issues.title: Evaluate deferred candidates
issues.description: For each 'Remain deferred' candidate in enrichment-roadmap.md Section 3: check if new repos provide cross-domain validation. Promote or confirm deferral.

issues.title: Scout new repos
issues.description: Search foxhound ecosystem tier for repos matching codebook gaps. Add promising repos via 'context add <repo-url>'. Update enrichment-roadmap.md Section 4.

issues.title: Update cross-domain map
issues.description: After enrichment: update skills/pattern-extraction-pipeline/references/cross-domain-map.md with new force-cluster interactions discovered.
